title: Cosmium Foam
definition: The cosmic substance that forms the structure of the universe, similar to foam or froth.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The Universe is like a big, bubbly ocean. The galaxies are like the foam on top.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The cosmic substance that forms the structure of the universe can be compared to froth or foam.
difficulty_levels.expert: Cosmium Foam is a novel concept for the cosmic substance that aggregates under specific conditions, creating visible structures like galaxies and dark matter. This concept positions the phenomenon as an emergent byproduct rather than a growing structure.

extra_fields.insight: The Universe is not a web but an ocean, and what we see as galaxies are just the frothy Cosmium Spume.
